item.title: Northstar Demo Bank $300 checking bonus spotted again
item.description: Northstar Demo Bank offers a $300 checking bonus for new customers. Open by December 31, 2026. Receive qualifying direct deposits totaling $1,000 within 90 days. Monthly service fee is $12, waived with qualifying direct deposit. Available only to residents of CA, OR.

item.title: Sunset Demo Bank checking bonus has ended
item.description: Sunset Demo Bank offers a $200 checking bonus for new customers. Receive qualifying direct deposits totaling $500 within 60 days. Monthly service fee is $10, waived with qualifying direct deposit. Offer ends May 31, 2026.
